senses.definition: a delicate cotton or silky cloth made by weaving or knitting threads in an open web-like pattern

examples.x: She adorned her wedding gown with beautiful lace, giving it a timeless and elegant look.
Her dress featured intricate lace detailing around the neckline and sleeves.
The seamstress added a lace trim to the hem of the vintage skirt to enhance its charm.
For the special occasion, she chose a lace tablecloth that complemented the fine china perfectly.

senses.definition: cloth that is made from the fibers of a plant called flax, used to make fine clothes, etc.

examples.x: She dressed in a simple linen dress, enjoying the breathability and comfort of the fabric on the hot summer day.
The artisan crafted intricate embroidery on the linen napkins, adding a personalized touch to the dining experience.
As a sustainable choice, many environmentally-conscious consumers opt for linen towels and linens, appreciating the eco-friendly qualities of the natural fiber.
The table was elegantly set with a linen tablecloth, adding a touch of sophistication to the dinner party.

senses.definition: a soft yarn or fabric, made from the fine wool of the angora goat
strong material made from animal skin and used for making clothes, bags, shoes, etc.

examples.x: The artisan crafted a beautiful leather wallet, carefully stitching each seam by hand.
The furniture store showcased a range of leather sofas, each offering a luxurious and sophisticated look.
After years of use, the leather shoes had developed a rich patina that added character and charm.

senses.definition: a soft thick fabric made of cotton with a velvety nap, which is very durable
a type of plain transparent fabric that is fine and lightweight, used for making garments, curtains or sheets
a smooth kind of leather with a high-gloss finish
a synthetic fiber that is quick to dry and is widely used in textile industry
a type of very smooth fabric with a glossy surface
a type of smooth soft fabric made from the threads that silkworms produce

examples.x: She draped a silk scarf around her neck, enjoying the cool, smooth texture against her skin.
The evening gown was crafted from exquisite red silk, flowing gracefully as she walked.
He gifted her a set of luxurious silk pajamas for their anniversary.
The bride's veil was made of delicate silk, adding a touch of elegance to her wedding attire.
They decided to use silk curtains for the living room to give it a more refined look.

senses.definition: a tough synthetic fiber that is light and elastic, used in textile industry
a textile fiber made by chemical processes that is used for clothes and dries quickly
fine, soft wool that is originally taken from the undercoat of the Kashmir goat
a fabric that is dark with light thin lines woven into it, used for business suits
(of fabric) having a pattern of light narrow lines on a dark background

examples.x: He wore a pinstriped suit with thin white lines on a navy blue background.
The pinstriped shirt added a touch of sophistication to his ensemble.
Her pinstriped trousers were tailored for a professional look.
The pinstriped tie complemented his crisp white shirt.
The pinstriped lining of the coat added a subtle detail to the garment.

senses.definition: a lightweight and transparent fabric made from silk or nylon
material used for making clothes, which is made by knitting or weaving silk, cotton, etc.

examples.x: The tailor measured the cloth before cutting it for the suit.
He preferred clothes made from natural cloth like cotton and linen.
The market stall was filled with colorful cloth of various patterns and textures.
They used fine silk cloth to create elegant evening gowns.

senses.definition: a strong but soft cotton fabric patterned with raised straight lines
a light and soft fabric with wrinkles and folds in its surface that is made of synthetic or natural fibers
a soft cotton or woolen cloth with a loose texture that is used for making clothes or sheets
an item of clothing made of the skin of a dead animal, typically mammals like foxes or rabbits

examples.x: The vintage store had a beautiful fur wrap that looked like it had been preserved perfectly over the years.
During the chilly winter months, he loved to snuggle up in his favorite fur blanket while reading by the fireplace.
The fashion designer showcased a stunning collection that featured elegant fur accessories to complement the evening gowns.

senses.definition: thick thread made from the fibers of sheep or other animals, commonly used for knitting

examples.x: She bought several skeins of wool to knit a warm sweater for the winter.
The shop offered a variety of colors and textures of wool for all kinds of knitting projects.
After learning how to knit, he quickly became fascinated with different types of wool.
The blanket was made from soft wool, providing warmth on chilly nights.
She enjoyed experimenting with patterns using different shades of wool to create unique designs.

senses.definition: a woolen fabric patterned with lines and squares, originally from Scotland
(of clothes) designed with special material that keeps the wearer warm

examples.x: She wore a thermal jacket and pants to stay warm during the winter hike.
Keeping warm in the winter is important, so I invested in thermal socks and a cozy blanket.
The outdoor enthusiasts wore thermal base layers to maintain their body temperature in the chilly conditions

senses.definition: a pattern of small squares, typically in two colors, used on fabric and resembling a checkerboard
having a pattern of small squares with usually two different colors

examples.x: She wore a checked blouse that featured a classic black and white pattern.
He glanced at the checked shirt hanging in his closet, debating whether to wear it for the casual outing.
The checked flag waved vigorously as the winner crossed the finish line, signaling the end of the race.

senses.definition: a synthetic fabric with a soft, fuzzy texture that mimics the look and feel of natural suede leather
soft leather with a velvety surface, used for making shoes, jackets, etc.

examples.x: She treated herself to a pair of suede boots, perfect for adding a touch of luxury to her fall wardrobe.
His suede jacket had a soft, velvety texture that made it both stylish and comfortable.
The designer bag was made from suede, giving it a rich, elegant appearance that stood out from other materials.
She learned the hard way that suede shoes should be kept away from water, as the material stains easily.
He admired the suede armchair in the store, noting how the soft leather would make a cozy addition to his living room.

senses.definition: a type of leather with a soft, napped surface that is created by sanding or buffing the underside of animal skin
having a repeated design or decorative arrangement of colors

examples.x: She wore a patterned dress adorned with vibrant florals that caught everyone's attention.
The patterned wallpaper added a touch of personality to the otherwise plain room.
The artisan showcased a collection of patterned fabrics, each unique in color and design.

senses.definition: a soft and warm fabric similar to sheep's wool in texture
having a fine and smooth surface that is pleasant to the touch

examples.x: Her hair felt silky after she applied the deep conditioner.
He admired the silky texture of the cream as it absorbed into his skin.
The kitten's fur was so silky that it was a pleasure to pet.
She loved the silky feel of the sheets on her bed, making it hard to get out in the morning.
The silky smooth texture of the lotion left her skin feeling soft and hydrated.

senses.definition: simple in design, without a specific pattern

examples.x: She preferred plain dresses with minimal embellishments.
The plain white walls of the room provided a blank canvas for decoration.
His shirt was plain, without any stripes, dots, or other designs.
The curtains were plain, allowing ample sunlight to filter into the room.

senses.definition: made of or related to wool

examples.x: She wore a cozy woolen sweater to keep warm during the chilly winter evening.
The artisans at the market sold beautifully crafted woolen blankets that were perfect for snuggling.
He preferred woolen socks for hiking, as they kept his feet dry and warm in any weather.
The local sheep farm offered a variety of woolen products, from yarn to scarves, all made from their own sheep's wool.
After a long day outside, she loved to curl up on the couch with a woolen throw draped over her legs.

senses.definition: covered in or made of wool

examples.x: She knitted a wooly scarf for her friend as a birthday gift.
The sheepdog had a thick, wooly coat that kept it insulated during the winter months.
The cozy blanket was woven from soft, wooly fibers.
She wore a wooly sweater to stay warm in the chilly weather.
He knitted a pair of wooly mittens for his niece to wear on cold days.

senses.definition: a cloth with a smooth and thick surface, typically made of cotton or silk

examples.x: The curtains were made of rich velvet, adding a touch of luxury to the room.
The tailor carefully measured the velvet before cutting it for the gown.
She draped the velvet over the armchair, instantly transforming its appearance.
In the dimly lit room, the velvet curtains added an air of mystery.

senses.definition: a teardrop-shaped, intricate design pattern characterized by a curved, abstract floral motif

examples.x: She loved the intricate swirls and teardrop shapes of paisley, finding them endlessly fascinating.
The paisley in the fabric's design added a touch of sophistication and charm to the dress.
The fashion designer incorporated paisley into her latest collection, drawing inspiration from vintage patterns.
He admired the craftsmanship of the handmade rug, particularly the paisley woven into its intricate design.

senses.definition: having patterns or designs featuring flowers
a design applied to a fabric using methods such as screen printing, digital printing, or block printing
a cloth with a pattern marked by intersecting straight lines or paths

examples.x: She wore a plaid to keep warm during the cold hike.
The store specializes in selling plaids for making custom shirts.
He draped the plaid over his shoulders as a blanket.
The picnic table was covered with a red and white plaid.
The fashion designer used a bold plaid in her collection.

senses.definition: having a pattern of straight parallel lines

examples.x: She wore a striped shirt with alternating lines of blue and white.

senses.definition: a pattern consisting of round spots that are equally spaced apart and can vary in size and color
decorated with a series of small, circular spots or points
cloth made from the fibers of the cotton plant, naturally soft and comfortable against the skin

examples.x: Cotton fabric is a staple in my wardrobe because of its breathability and comfort, especially during hot summer days.
I prefer cotton towels because of their absorbency and softness, making them perfect for drying off after a refreshing shower.
The durability of cotton bed sheets ensures they withstand frequent washing and maintain their quality over time.
The natural feel of cotton against my skin makes it my top choice for bedding, ensuring a cozy and comfortable night's sleep.
I love the versatility of cotton clothing, from casual T-shirts for lounging at home to elegant cotton dresses for special occasions.

senses.definition: cloth that is made by weaving cotton yarn, silk, etc., which is used in making clothes

examples.x: The dress was made from a luxurious silk fabric that shimmered in the light.
She chose a soft cotton fabric for the baby's new blanket to ensure it was gentle on the skin.
The tailor recommended using a lightweight fabric for the summer suit to keep it breathable.
The fabric store had a wide variety of patterns and colors to choose from for making custom curtains.
He ran his hand over the fabric swatches, feeling the difference between the smooth satin and the rough burlap.

senses.definition: a design consisting of lines or bands with a different color from the background, often used on clothing, textiles, or other surfaces

examples.x: The cat has a stripe on its tail.
The raccoon has a black stripe across its eyes.

senses.definition: patterned with small colored dots

examples.x: The spotted leopard moved silently through the jungle, blending in with its surroundings.
She wore a spotted dress with bright polka dots that stood out at the party.
The spotted pattern on the butterfly's wings made it easy to identify.
His notebook had a spotted cover, speckled with ink stains from years of use.
The farmer noticed that the cow had developed a few more spotted patches on its coat.

senses.definition: a rough woolen fabric woven by different colored threads, originally made in Scotland, especially used for coats and suits
(of a fabric or piece of clothing) with a pattern of raised lines
any type of knitted, felted or woven cloth

examples.x: The factory produces high-quality textiles for clothing.
The market sold colorful textiles made from natural fibers.
He imported fine silk textiles from Asia.
The museum displayed ancient textiles with intricate patterns.
The company specializes in eco-friendly textiles.

senses.definition: (of a fabric or piece of clothing) made with many small folds or pleats

examples.x: She chose a ruched blouse for its figure-flattering design, accentuating her curves in all the right places.
The ruched sleeves of the jacket added a feminine twist to the otherwise classic silhouette.
The bride's gown featured a ruched waistline, creating a romantic and ethereal look for her wedding day.

senses.definition: a textile that is coated or laminated with a substance that prevents water from penetrating through it

examples.x: The jacket is made of a lightweight waterproof to keep you dry.
Manufacturers often use waterproofs for outdoor gear and clothing.
The tent’s waterproof ensured no leaks during the heavy rain.
She chose a backpack with a built-in waterproof for her hiking trip.
The waterproof of the coat began to wear out after years of use.

senses.definition: a type of fabric construction where a single yarn is looped continuously to create interlocking rows of stitches
strong cotton cloth that is usually blue in color, particularly used in making jeans

examples.x: The jacket was made of durable denim, making it ideal for casual outings and outdoor activities.
After a few washes, the denim started to fade, giving it a stylish, vintage look.
Many fashion designers are now experimenting with sustainable denim, focusing on eco-friendly production methods.

senses.definition: a shiny cloth made of cotton, often decorated with flower patterns, that is used for furniture covers and curtains
having a pattern of evenly spaced, round spots or dots

examples.x: She wore a polka-dotted dress with white dots on a navy blue background.
The polka-dotted wrapping paper added a festive touch to the gift.
The polka-dotted wallpaper in the nursery created a playful atmosphere.
His tie was polka-dotted with small red dots against a black background.
Her umbrella was polka-dotted in bright colors, standing out on a rainy day.

senses.definition: a durable cotton fabric with a slight nap or pile on the surface, originally made in the Middle Ages in Europe
